nasb.text: So they went on their way from the presence of the Council, rejoicing that they had been considered worthy to suffer shame for His name.

esv.text: Then they left the presence of the council, rejoicing that they were counted worthy to suffer dishonor for the name.

cnv.text: 使徒歡歡喜喜從公議會裡出來，因為他們算是配得為主的名受辱。

ccb.text: 使徒离开公会后，为自己有资格为主的名受辱而欢喜。

csbs.text: 这样使徒们就快快乐乐地离开了议会，因为算是配得上为这名受凌辱。
